basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) has published the Project Officer Notification 2026 on 7 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Officer position. Candidates within the age range of up to 35 years and holding a Master’s degree in a relevant field, preferably in Social Science or Commerce with proficiency in accountancy and book-keeping, are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active until 14 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in a relevant field, with preference for Social Science or Commerce streams with proficiency in accountancy and book-keeping.
qualification.details: Project Officer: Master's degree in a relevant field. Preference will be given to candidates from Social Science or Commerce streams with proficiency in accountancy and book-keeping. Minimum Two (2) years of experience in Tribal/Social Development Project Implementation.

salary_details.details: Project Officer: ₹ 30,000/- (Consolidated salary, shall be fixed based on the qualification and relevant experience of the Candidate)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Project Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Officer position is 14th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in a relevant field. Preference is given to those from Social Science or Commerce streams with proficiency in accountancy and book-keeping.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the Project Officer post is 35 years as of the notification date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of ₹ 30,000/- per month. This salary may be fixed based on qualification and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Officer post announced by the Centre for Management Development.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Project Officer position is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The Project Officer position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMD/PGA/002/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Centre for Management Development located?
faq.answer: The Centre for Management Development is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695014.

faq.question: Q10. What is the required experience for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a minimum of two (2) years of experience in Tribal/Social Development Project Implementation.
